LCC-HS9-L2-BR300-HSSCIPHY-CFB-NAV-01 • HS Physical Science 9–10 • Periodic Table Patterns and Electron Configuration

The Outer Shell Secret

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What does the girl ask the boy about?
2QUESTION 2: Why do elements in the same group react in similar ways?
3QUESTION 3: What will the girl most likely do differently after this conversation?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Why does the girl tell the boy she is confused? Why does the boy bring up the outer shell?
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  NGSS HS-PS1-1  |  HS Science: Physical Science Grades 9–10
